meta.name: object-calisthenics
meta.title: Object Calisthenics Skill
meta.description: Enforces Object Calisthenics principles for business domain code to ensure clean, maintainable, and robust code Triggers on: **/*.{cs,ts,java}

original_definition.skill_description: Enforces Object Calisthenics principles for business domain code to ensure clean, maintainable, and robust code Triggers on: **/*.{cs,ts,java}

rules.description: >  Warning: This file contains the 9 original Object Calisthenics rules. No additional rules must be added, and none of these rules should be replaced
This rule enforces the principles of Object Calisthenics to ensure clean, maintainable, and robust code in the backend, primarily for business domain

directives.description: Primary focus: Business domain classes (aggregates, entities, value objects, domain services)
Secondary focus: Application layer services and use case handlers
1. One Level of Indentation per Method:
Ensure methods are simple and do not exceed one level of indentation.
// Bad Example - this method has multiple levels of indentation
// Good Example - Extracted method to reduce indentation
// Good Example - Filtering users before sending emails
